summary: Release risk low: the story's true merge-base diff is purely additive (new registry module, +33 wiring lines, tests; zero deletions), the --json schema gains only an additive preflight field, auto_fix detections are conservative (exact story_id match with append-only catalog write; status-artifact fix reuses the recordVerificationEvidence path that IAP #299 made idempotent), the rollback plan matches the actual footprint, and no interaction with PAB #296 or RML #297 code paths. Full suite 889/889, e2e 8/8 (run by reviewer).

inspection.summary: Recomputed the diff against the true merge-base after the origin/main..HEAD stat showed stale-base noise, read both auto_fix recipes for conservativeness, checked the autopilot wiring and render section for additivity, verified the rollback plan text against the real footprint, self-ran the e2e suite.

judgment_delta: initial: the raw origin/main diff looked destructive (302 files) and auto_fix writes looked risky -> final: pass, because the true merge-base diff is additive-only and both auto_fix paths are conservative append/reuse operations
